metadata.name: Acknowledge new version of a compliance document

description: A new version of a safety procedure has been released. An operator needs to acknowledge that they have read and understood it.

nodes.task_description: Access the list of pending training or document acknowledgements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sees the new safety procedure in their to-do list.

nodes.task_description: Open and review the new document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reads the updated safety procedure.

nodes.task_description: Electronically sign to acknowledge understanding of the new procedure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent signs off on the document, and it is removed from their pending list.
